title: University of Missouri unveils new Thompson Center building for world-class autism care
summary_en:
State-of-the-art building for the Thompson Center for Autism & Neurodevelopment illustrates ongoing transformational support, 
opens doors to brighter futures for families.
title_cn: 密苏里大学揭幕汤普森中心新大楼 提供世界一流孤独症诊疗服务

title: Missouri School of Journalism Professor Marty Steffens wins 2026 Distinguished Achievement Award
title_cn: 密苏里大学新闻学院教授马蒂·斯蒂芬斯获2026年度商业编辑与写作协会杰出成就奖

title: Inspired by the brain, Mizzou researchers build smarter, more efficient computer hardware
summary_en: A University of Missouri study shows that small material changes can boost brain-like computing, which could one day help make artificial intelligence more energy-efficient.
title_cn: 密苏里大学研究人员受人脑启发研发更智能高效的计算机硬件

title: Photo gallery: 2026 Faculty Excellence Week celebrates teaching, research, service
title_cn: 密苏里大学举办2026年卓越教师周活动 表彰教学、科研与服务领域贡献

title: Media Advisory: Mizzou hosts President’s Distinguished Lecture, groundbreaking ceremony for Radioisotope Science Center
summary_en: Members of the media may register to attend one or both.
title_cn: 密苏里大学将举办校长杰出讲座暨放射性同位素科学中心奠基仪式

title: A University of Missouri and B&B Theatres production: STEM Cinema
summary_en: Mizzou partnered with the theater chain to tap into faculty expertise and student creativity to produce educational intros to family-friendly films.
title_cn: 密苏里大学与B&B院线合作推出“STEM影院”教育合作项目

title: A legacy of growth: Dean Kristofer Hagglund reflects on 25 years with College of Health Sciences
summary_en: Retirement reception will begin at 3:30 p.m. on May 19 at Clark Hall.
title_cn: 密苏里大学健康科学学院院长克里斯托弗·哈格伦德回顾25年任职历程 即将正式退休

title: A look at Mizzou’s 2025 published authors
title_cn: 密苏里大学发布2025年教职人员著作出版情况及最新研究成果

title: Less water, same taste: New approach helps growers produce sweet corn more efficiently
summary_en: University of Missouri researchers find farmers can cut back on water without losing crop quality.
title_cn: 密苏里大学研究形成甜玉米节水高效种植技术 减少用水量同时保障作物品质

title: Meet a Mizzou Law student ambassador
summary_en: As a law school ambassador, Elly Lang DeVeney helps incoming students build connections, find community and feel at home.
title_cn: 密苏里大学法学院发布学生大使埃莉·朗·德夫尼履职相关情况
